Carrot experienced a critical setback from a Drift exploit, leading to initial shutdown. However, operations resumed with mint/redeem functionality restored. The project achieved ~90% liquidity for remaining TVL and reopened CRT redemption. Project0 recorded 2.6% drawdown with $57.52 redemption price.

tweets.fullText:
Correction on this. The final drawdown from Project0 was 2.6% and the final estimated redemption price is $57.5209

Apologies for the error

1/ Carrot is shutting down

This is certainly not the outcome we wanted, but the situation with the Drift exploit, has proven to be catastrophic for our continued operations.

1/ We have unpaused the Carrot program. Mint/redeem is now open again. 

https://t.co/rD42OvtA7t

1/ Update on Carrot

Even though we are still waiting on Drift for the official next steps from them, we are now ~90% liquid for the remaining TVL and will soon (hopefully tomorrow) open up CRT redemption.

1/ Update on Carrot

mostInteresting.reason: Spark captured 93,000 ETH deposits (+$2.8B+ TVL) following April 18 volatility, demonstrating rapid competitive capital migration. This represents a significant competitive threat to Kamino's ability to attract liquidity during market stress periods and shows how competitors are winning on product-market fit during crises.
